sys_script_include.name: GetEmployeeId

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_c96300a647072110eea9ba48436d434f
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_1052881_module3. GetEmployeeId</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>true</client_callable><description>Get employee details</description><name> GetEmployeeId</name><script><![CDATA[var  GetEmployeeId = Class.create();
// Extend the global.AbstractAjaxProcessor class
 GetEmployeeId.prototype = Object.extendsObject(global.AbstractAjaxProcessor,{
  // Define the getEmail function.  
  // Create a GlideRecord for the User table.
  // Use the sysparm_userID passed from the client side to retrieve a record from the User table.
  // Return the email address for the requested record
  getEmpId: function() {
    var userRecord = new GlideRecord("sys_user");
    userRecord.get(this.getParameter('sysparm_userID'));
    return userRecord.EmpId + '';
  },
  type: 'GetEmployeeId'
});]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2023-05-29 10:03:57</sys_created_on><sys_id>c96300a647072110eea9ba48436d434f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name> GetEmployeeId</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Module3" source="x_1052881_module3">c9619ea047b2a510eea9ba48436d4318</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Module3">c9619ea047b2a510eea9ba48436d4318</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_c96300a647072110eea9ba48436d434f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2023-05-29 10:03:57</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
